source_meaning: secluded place where people meditate in solitude
target_meaning: the tranquil and desolate scenery in Buddhist temples

source_meaning: used to describe a situation that is so hopeless that nothing can be done to fix it anymore, so the speaker feels devastated
target_meaning: a talented person with big ambitions, stuck in a hopeless situation and unable to escape

source_meaning: used to say that the given situation is good or beneficial
target_meaning: to bring benefits; to be profitable

source_meaning: law of the jungle (survival of the fittest, strongest, or most cunning)
target_meaning: survival of the fittest; big fish eat little fish

source_idiom: wszędzie dobrze, ale w domu najlepiej
target_idiom: cáo chết ba năm quay đầu về núi
source_meaning: there's no place like home
target_meaning: a person always longs for home

source_meaning: school camp, field trip (form of education (typically implemented within primary schools) involving a field trip with a class' teachers to a place of natural or touristic significance)
target_meaning: to go to a remote, mountainous and underdeveloped area to do voluntary teaching

source_meaning: to keep in check (to discipline)
target_meaning: to prize and maintain harmony

source_meaning: to separate the wheat from the chaff
target_meaning: separate the wheat from the chaff

source_meaning: to be green with envy
target_meaning: to be bursting with jealousy; to be jealous; to hate on others because of jealousy

source_meaning: to sweep under the rug (to conceal a problem)
target_meaning: to put a lot of effort into hiding something bad

source_meaning: Achilles heel (vulnerability in an otherwise strong situation)
target_meaning: Achilles heel; weakness

source_meaning: no man's land (disputed or uncontrolled territory)
target_meaning: dangerous place that is difficult to access and full of obstacles

source_meaning: unbearable
target_meaning: discordant and intolerable

source_meaning: forever (from the beginning)
target_meaning: to have a beginning but not an end

source_meaning: zombie (person who is very seriously ill, close to death)
target_meaning: extremely lazy, as if one's body were about to rot, with no life signals

source_meaning: much ado about nothing; great cry and little wool; all talk and no action; all bark and no bite (big changes could have been expected, but they did not happen)
target_meaning: all bark and no bite

source_meaning: coming from a family that is considered to be respectable and with traditions (Is there an English equivalent to this definition?)
target_meaning: to be well-matched in terms of socio-economic status (for purposes of marriage); to have similar family backgrounds

target_idiom: một cây làm chẳng nên non, ba cây chụm lại nên hòn núi cao
source_meaning: united we stand, divided we fall
target_meaning: unity is strength

source_idiom: jak się baby nie bije, to jej wątroba gnije
source_meaning: men are usually the dominant ones in a marriage, which is why they have to hit their wives into submission (usually used to justify violence against women)
target_meaning: valuing men above women, the belief that men are superior to women

source_meaning: pigtail (braided plait of hair)
target_meaning: nghìn cân treo sợi tóc

source_meaning: acute accent (rising tone)
target_meaning: Traditional tone placement spelling of nhập gia tuỳ tục.

source_meaning: every time
target_meaning: each and every move; every single action

source_meaning: to be like water off a duck's back
target_meaning: like water off a duck's back.

source_idiom: z tyłu liceum, z przodu muzeum
target_idiom: phi công trẻ lái máy bay bà già
source_meaning: mutton dressed as lamb (woman who tries to look like a very young person but her face shows her older age)
target_meaning: Describes a younger man who loves or dates an older woman.

source_meaning: you learn from your mistakes
target_meaning: When making a mistake, do not be afraid to correct it.

source_idiom: złej tanecznicy zawadza rąbek u spódnicy
source_meaning: a bad workman always blames his tools
target_meaning: a gentleman is no tool

target_idiom: quân tử trả thù, mười năm chưa muộn
source_meaning: revenge is sweet; revenge is something pleasureable
target_meaning: revenge is a dish best served cold

source_meaning: with life, lively (energetically and quickly)
target_meaning: lively and vigorous

source_meaning: freezing cold
target_meaning: very cold; freezing

source_meaning: One should not do dangerous things and value their life.
target_meaning: to value one's life so much to the point of being cowardly

source_meaning: coitus, copulation, sexual intercourse
target_meaning: to impotent, unable to achieve or sustain an erection, having impotentia coeundi

source_meaning: lonely as can be; very lonely
target_meaning: utterly alone; isolated without family, friends, or support

source_meaning: to be kind and compassionate towards others
target_meaning: to be altruistic and charitable to each other, especially in times of crisis or disaster

source_meaning: to live on the grace of someone richer or in a higher position [ genitive ]
target_meaning: to be grateful to one's benefactor

source_meaning: to forgive and forget, to let bygones be bygones
target_meaning: to forget and deny the favors of one's benefactor

source_meaning: snapdragon (any plant of the genus Antirrhinum)
target_meaning: synonym of ba que xỏ lá

source_meaning: said of people who are unmusical, especially tone-deaf or sing off-key
target_meaning: singers and (more generally) musicians are immoral

source_meaning: to rediscover common knowledge
target_meaning: reviewing learnt knowledge helps one understand it better; reviewing the past helps one understand the present

source_meaning: to keep going, to keep living (to not die despite difficult conditions such as disease or age)
target_meaning: to live forever and never grow old
